abort.already_configured: Manager for YNAB is already configured.

data.db_path: SQLite database path (leave as-is for default)

user.description: Configure your creds and custom SQLite DB path (if desired).
user.title: Manager for YNAB

add_transaction.description: Create a YNAB transaction using choices from the SQLite export.

account_name.description: Account name from the SQLite export.
account_name.name: Account

amount.description: Transaction amount. Positive values are expenses.
amount.name: Amount

category_name.description: Category as category group and name separated by a hyphen. Ignored when the payee is another account, which makes the transaction a transfer.
category_name.name: Category

cleared.description: Cleared status for the new transaction.
cleared.name: Cleared

date.description: Date picker value to use only when Use current date is off.
date.name: Date

payee_name.description: Payee name. Existing payees are resolved from the SQLite export.
payee_name.name: Payee

plan_name.description: Plan name from the SQLite export. Optional when only one plan exists.
plan_name.name: Plan

quiet.description: Suppress output from the underlying libraries.
quiet.name: Quiet

sync.description: Sync the SQLite export before creating the transaction.
sync.name: Sync

use_current_date.description: Use the current date in Home Assistant's local timezone. When enabled, Date is ignored.
use_current_date.name: Use current date

add_transaction.name: Add transaction

for_real.description: Approve the matched transactions instead of running in dry-run mode.
for_real.name: For real

quiet.description: Suppress output from the underlying library.
quiet.name: Quiet

sync.description: Sync the SQLite export before processing transactions.
sync.name: Sync

pending_income.description: Run manager-for-ynab pending income and update the sensor.

for_real.description: Apply the transaction date updates instead of running in dry-run mode.
for_real.name: For real

quiet.description: Suppress output from the underlying library.
quiet.name: Quiet

sync.description: Sync the SQLite export before processing transactions.
sync.name: Sync

pending_income.name: Pending income

sqlite_export.description: Run sqlite-export-for-ynab using the configured token and DB path.

full_refresh.description: Drop and rebuild the SQLite export instead of performing an incremental sync.
full_refresh.name: Full refresh

quiet.description: Suppress output from the underlying library.
quiet.name: Quiet

sqlite_export.name: SQLite export

sqlite_query.description: Execute SQL against the configured SQLite database and return the results.

sql.description: The SQL statement(s) to execute against the configured SQLite database.
sql.name: SQL

sync.description: Sync the SQLite export before executing the query.
sync.name: Sync

sqlite_query.name: SQLite query
